name: Warm Like Fire
description:
Warm Like Fire Incredibox has 25 characters

Firaz, a burning meteor who is always worried

Bimby Baby, his sister, is very energetic.

Smokey, likes to "chimney smoke."

Smoothering, a glitching pixel worm-like character, who seems to be also energetic.

Oombi, a stick figure who really loves his bows and drums.

Sunnder, he's a grumpy sun.

Louie, he's a ninja lighter.

Furnacy, he's Louie's grandfather.

Spots, she's a cute white dog and black dog who is a firefighter. Also her thighs are thicc. Gets along with everyone except Sunnder.

Exitty, he's an exit sign who's...broken. Poor guy.

Lantyern, he's a magical talking lantern with no face but is cool.

Meggie, she's a cheerleader who always cheers people up on certain occasions.

Finland, he's a crazy but fun guy.

Buckthorn, he's Oombi's talking pink white-tail-tipped cat. Hates Heathead.

Heathead, has depression and is never felt confident.

Fry, she's a cute 5 yr old Robloxian girl who's ready to party every day.

Matchestickers, he's a match that says his catchphrase like all the time.

Inigsuluta, she's a lava bucket who acts crazily "normal".

Playsand, hides in a sandpile but is shy and kind.

Magmo, he's half human, half lava creature, he's kind and cool to hang out with.

Flamma, loves to play his guitar and is cool but kind.

Firelie Grillocot, she's a little girl who loves her orange sweater that's way too bigger for her.

Blark Blacksmith, he works in a blacksmith and he has a kind and helpful heart.

Francis I. Scorch, he's a floating high school guy who's acts like he doesn't care for everyone but deep down he does.

You're the newbie in the gang.
creator: OrengePlaysAbgerny
